_meta.description: Pinned per-tenant trust roots for the bipcircle-verifier. Each tenant entry binds the verifier to a specific bank-service URL, XRPL issuer account, KMS public key (by kid pattern), and token contract — eliminating the user-supplied-URL trust gap (Pro audit F1+F2). Updates happen via verifier source releases: a tenant onboarding flips on v2 seals → operator opens a PR to this file → new verifier version cuts → npm publish. Verifiers in the field upgrade when a new tenant comes online.
